name: Flav | Duo | Pink Push Pop X Sour Tangie | Indica X Sativa | Flower
description: Experience a dynamic pairing of premium cannabis with Flav Duos, a 14g selection of two distinct strains designed with complementary effects and terpene profiles to elevate your senses. Featuring two standout strains Pink Push Pop, a dreamy indica with berry-sweet notes that melts away stress, and Sour Tangie, a citrus-forward sativa that hits with an energizing uplift and creative spark. Whether you're winding down or turning up, Flav Duos gives you the freedom to choose your vibe — or mix and match for the best of both worlds.

name: Gelato 51 - Diamond Dusted Prerolls - 5 pack - 3.5g
description: Blast off with To The Moon's 5-Pack Pre-Roll Joints. Each pre-roll is packed with 0.7g of top-flight flower and dusted with pure THC diamonds for a smooth, ultra-potent, and premium smoking experience.

name: Ayrloom | Lime Haze | AIO | 1g
description: Fresh citrus + juicy lime wrapped in soft haze for a smooth, flavor-filled lift. A citrus-charged burst of clarity brings that green flag energy—leaving you lifted, inspired + creative. Made for stepping into the limelight.

name: Sour Cherry Indica Enhanced Gummies
description: Wyld's mellow and carefree Sour Cherry Indica Enhanced gummies are perfect for unwinding after life's great adventures. Made with real fruit and botanical terpenes, these gummies pack a tart twist. Looking for an internal reprieve? It's a little like a hammock for your inner thoughts.

name: The Belafonte Live Resin Badder | 1g
description: MFNY's The Belafonte badder is a premium concentrate made in house, using hydrocarbon extraction method. It starts with our best, in-house grown, bred, and fresh-frozen The Belafonte buds. We flash freeze our plants right after harvest to lock in all the trichome-and-terpene-rich goodness of the plant (this is the "Live" part of Resin). The Belafonte is a perfect balance of Grape and Banana from its parentage; known to promote an arousing head high with long-lasting, invigorating cerebral effects that spread to your whole body. Live Resin badder concentrate has a soft, butter-like texture for an easy-to-use, super enjoyable experience. Our Live Resin concentrates are exclusively single-source and produced at the highest of standards in our state-of-art laboratory space, using scientific precision and years of experience, which we've proudly gathered together in New York's Hudson Valley.

name: MIAMI HEAT (1 OZ)
description: This one lights up fast - a heady sativa that slaps you awake and keeps you sharp. Miami Heat fuels your focus, boosts your mood, and hits with that high-energy, full-court press. Expect bright citrus and sweet grape on the inhale, with a funky skunk finish that lingers. It's loud in both flavor and effect, perfect for creatives, grinders, or anyone trying to stay in the zone.

name: LEMON OG (14 PACK PRE-ROLL)
description: Lemon OG – The latest citrus twist in our 14-pack pre-roll series, Lemon OG hits quick with that smooth, skunky punch and a wave of mellow euphoria. This indica-leaning hybrid blends laid-back, stress-melting vibes with a gentle fruity finish, perfect for unwinding and satisfying those late-night cravings. A fast-acting classic, reimagined for all-day DANK sessions.

name: 2g White Fire OG All-In-One Vape
description: White Fire OG, also known as WiFi OG, is a hybrid strain that combines the genetics of Fire OG and The White. It generally has a pungent, diesel-like aroma with earthy undertones. White Fire OG provides a powerful and uplifting cerebral high along with deep relaxation and potential pain relief.

name: Kiva | Camino Sours | Raspberry Lemonade | Bliss | 10pk Gummies | 100mg
description: For those moments when you want to make a great experience even more joyous—like hanging with friends at the beach or enjoying a comedy show— enter Camino Sours Raspberry Lemonade Bliss gummies. These delightful treats are designed to boost your mood and create a blissful experience no matter where you are and what you're up to. Each delectable gummy is infused with 10MG of THC and a tailored blend of hybrid-like terpenes that marries perfectly with the sweet, tangy notes of ripe raspberries and the flavors of fresh, sugary lemonade. Welcome to your happy place!

name: The Botanist | Ruffhouse - RFH | Indica
description: Dried cannabis flower is primarily ingested via inhalation. Activation time is roughly about 5 minutes and can last up to a few hours. Indica dominant cannabis strains are typically used for relaxation and sleep, which is why many users prefer to consume Indica strains in the evenings.

name: Head & Heal | Focus | 1:4 THC:CBG | Tincture | 150mg
description: Your daily to-do list's best friend. A great alternative to coffee or energy drinks as a way to naturally support mental clarity, focus, and creativity. Precise-dosing information for every bottle is included on the side of each box. Simply measure out your exact dose and drop directly into your mouth as needed throughout the day for natural support in focusing your mind and calming your body.

name: Fruit Punch | Melted Diamond Live Resin Vaporizer | 1.0g (Ready to use)
description: This one packs a punch. Fruit Punch is made by crossing Skunk, Haze, and Northern Lights strains and is named for its swift hit of sweet, fruity, and tropical notes. One hit packs a punch of energy, sparking the mind while relaxing the body. Fruity, sweet notes of berry make Fruit Punch a super tasty treat.
genetics: Skunk x Haze x Northern Lights

name: 40 Tons | Indica | 7 Pack Prerolls
description: Rolled up and ready to smoke, Pre-Rolls are a convenient and effective way to consume cannabis. Pre-Rolls come in many different forms and can be rolled with flower, shake, "b-buds", infused with concentrates, and more.

name: Off Hours | Offline | Cherry Berry | 10:10:4 THC:CBD:CBN | 10 Pack Gummies | 100mg
description: Our Cherry Berry flavored gummies are specially formulated with the perfect combination of THC, CBN, and CBD to send you fast asleep. Sweet dreams. Nano-enhanced cannabinoids for fast onset. Vegan friendly and gluten free.

name: Hepworth | Durban Poison x SOAP | Hybrid | Flower
description: Hepworth's Durban Poison × SOAP (3.5 g) blends the clarity and classic vigor of Durban genetics with the modern, refined aroma profile associated with SOAP. Grown in living soil and powered by natural sunlight, this hybrid reflects Hepworth's commitment to clean, regenerative cultivation. Expect a crisp, energetic lift layered with subtle floral and herbal notes, creating a bright, focused experience shaped by the farm's decades of sustainable agricultural expertise.

name: Candy Rain | Riverway Live Rosin Badder | 1g
description: At MFNY, we make RiverwayTM Live Rosin in a specific way that preserves powerful plant characteristics. We do this to highlight the difference between "real" live rosin and misleading alternatives on store shelves. Riverway isn't just a name, it's a promise to make products all New Yorkers can be proud of. Candy Rain Riverway Live Rosin badder is a premium concentrate that is created with a proprietary cultivation, freezing, and extraction process designed to preserve flavor, maximize potency, and ensure a truly solventless experience. It starts with our best, in-house grown, bred, and fresh-frozen Candy Rain buds. We flash freeze our plants right after meticulous harvest preparation to lock in all the trichome-and-terpene-rich goodness of the plant (this is the "Live" part of Rosin), and pull from only the best micron range. Candy Rain is known for its sweet candy aroma and flavor. Its effects are potent in THC, promoting a relaxing body high with long-lasting, invigorating cerebral effects that spread to your whole body. Live Rosin badder concentrate has a soft, butter-like texture for an easy-to-use, super enjoyable experience. Our Riverway Live Rosin concentrates are exclusively single-source and produced at the highest of standards in our next-generation laboratory space in New York's Hudson Valley.
